description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests on Linux that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, Boost interface options, and Capstone versions. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs dependencies, and then installs various tools including Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, and LIEF. Finally, it compiles Triton and runs unittests.
